response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and leadership capability, they fall well short of critical minimum qualifications: only ~1 year of C++ experience versus the required 8 years, and their career trajectory shows primarily web/backend and tooling focus rather than large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems at the required depth. The technical domain mismatch is too significant to overcome.
strengths: Demonstrated software craftsmanship with TDD, CI/CD, and code quality practices across diverse projects
Proven technical leadership in Staff roles with mentoring and knowledge-sharing capability
Adaptable engineer comfortable across multiple languages and domains, with some AWS infrastructure experience at Optilyz
concerns: Critical gap in C++ proficiency: only ~1 year demonstrated experience versus 8 years required minimum
Limited evidence of large-scale cloud architecture or distributed systems work at infrastructure scale—career focused on web/backend services
No production experience with compute platforms, storage systems, or hardware-level infrastructure relevant to the role

key_factors.factor: C++ experience gap (1 year vs 8 years required)
Cloud compute platform and infrastructure background
